error_signature: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'ldap')
title: SSO initialization error in n8n 1.120.4
symptom: When accessing the n8n application in the browser, a TypeError occurs, preventing the page from loading. The console shows 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'ldap')'.
root_cause: The new SSO features introduced in n8n 1.120+ require certain configuration variables to be set. If these variables are not defined, it leads to a TypeError during the initialization process, causing the application to fail to load.
fix_steps: Add the following environment variables under the environment section: N8N_SSO_SAML_ENABLED=false, N8N_SSO_OIDC_ENABLED=false, N8N_SSO_LDAP_ENABLED=false.
Run 'docker-compose down' to stop the current container.
Run 'docker-compose up -d' to restart the container with the new configuration.
agent_instruction: Add the required environment variables to your docker-compose.yml and restart the n8n container.
